top_signals.title: OpenAI, Meta, SpaceXAI compete for more cost-efficient AI models
top_signals.summary: While all promise to be more advanced, their biggest immediate selling point may not be what they can do, but how little they charge to do it.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Jannik Sinner savors victory after bouncing back to defend Wimbledon crown
top_signals.summary: The 24-year-old arrived at the All England Club a fortnight ago needing to answer his doubters ‌after a ‌second-round loss to unheralded Juan Manuel Cerundolo in Paris.
